workspace.templates.generate.description: Pick a starting shape and how the generator should handle a few sub-options. You can edit the result freely afterwards.
workspace.templates.generate.inline_imag: Linked URL via the imageURL helper. The slideout loads bytes from /api/images/<stem>/<file> — clean markdown, lighter exports.
Inlined as a base64 data URL via the imageBase64 helper. Heavier markdown but self-contained — useful for single-file HTML/PDF exports.
workspace.templates.generate.title: Generate Default Template
Loops emit a wrap=false opt-out — raw iterations, no <section> wrapper, no per-iteration styling hook.
Each iteration is wrapped in <section class="loop-item"> with a data-index attribute so CSS can style iterations distinctly.
Each api field renders as one line via apiSection — the helper builds the full embedded card at runtime. Lazy and tidy.
Each api field expands into one line per projected column using apiBlock so you can hand-tune or delete columns directly in the source.
